import {Link} from "react-router-dom"; import {useState} from "react"; const RegisterForm = () => { const [password, setPassword] = useState(""); const [passwordError, setPasswordError] = useState(""); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ username: '', email: '', password: '', confirmPassword: '', termsAccepted: false }) const [errors, setErrors] = useState({}) const handleChange = (e) => { const {name, value, type, checked} = e.target; setFormData({ ...formData, [name]: type === "checkbox" ? checked : value }) } const validateForm = () => { let formErrors = {}; if (!formData.username) formErrors.username = "" } return (
